title: InvoiceSchema
description: Structured-extraction JSON schema for invoices. Mandatory fields per the relevant national VAT act (e.g. HU VAT Act §169 for Hungarian invoices). _quotes and _confidence are anti-hallucination layers.

invoice_number.description: Invoice serial number. If incomplete, use null.

issue_date.description: Issue date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD). Normalize from other formats.

fulfillment_date.description: Fulfillment / service-delivery date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD).

payment_due_date.description: Payment due date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD).

currency.description: ISO 4217 code or well-known: USD, EUR, HUF, GBP, CHF

tax_id.description: Format depends on jurisdiction (HU: XXXXXXXX-X-XX, US: XX-XXXXXXX EIN, EU: VAT ID)

_quotes.description: ANTI-HALLUCINATION: verbatim document quotes (at least 3 quotes for key fields)

_confidence.description: ANTI-HALLUCINATION: per-field reliability: high | medium | low
